prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别约为26234、31412、28532、35978、39091名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近3年累计后移约10559名；2025年基准约39091名；该校在湖北省物理类招生计划2021–2025年分别为34、33、27、35、42人，2025年为42人；2026年计划48人，较2025年扩招约14.3%，招生名额增加使竞争有所加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第137名，近年排名在128–170之间波动，整体处于全国中游偏上水平；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及图书馆管理类事件，未见明显负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第104位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光量较低，报考关注度相对平稳；宁夏大学在第五轮学科评估中无A-及以上等级学科，整体学科实力以B类为主，优势集中在民族学、草学、水利工程等特色方向，对物理类考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续偏热，但宁夏大学物理类招生专业以化学工程与工艺、软件工程、计算机科学与技术、农林类为主，其中计算机类热度较高；湖北省2026年物理类考生数按历史比例估算约25.3万人，较2025年的24.98万人略有增加，竞争基数扩大；宁夏大学位于宁夏银川市，属于西北地区高校，对湖北省考生而言属于跨省远距离报考，地域偏好相对较弱；该校在湖北省招生占比不高，2025年物理类计划42人占该校当年总计划比例较小，地域因素对报考热度影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年扩招约14.3%及湖北省物理类考生小幅增加，在2025年基准39091名基础上预计竞争进一步加剧；预测最低位次约42492名，区间41992–42992名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 26234, 31412, 28532, 35978, and 39091, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 10559 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 39091; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hubei Province from 2021 to 2025 was 34, 33, 27, 35, and 42 students respectively, with 42 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 48 students, an increase of about 14.3% compared to 2025, and the increase in enrollment places intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking is approximately 137th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 128 and 170, overall at the upper-middle level nationwide; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving library management incidents, with no obvious negative public opinion; the Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 104th, rated as average, with low short video platform exposure and relatively stable application attention; Ningxia University has no A- or above disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, with overall discipline strength mainly at B level, focusing on characteristic directions such as Ethnology, Grassland Science, and Water Conservancy Engineering, which have limited appeal to Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remain socially popular, but Ningxia University's Physics Category enrollment majors mainly include Chemical Engineering and Technology, Software Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, and Agriculture/Forestry, among which Computer Science is relatively popular; the number of Physics Category candidates in Hubei Province in 2026 is estimated at about 253,000 based on historical proportions, a slight increase from 249,800 in 2025, expanding the competition base; Ningxia University is located in Yinchuan City, Ningxia, a university in the northwest region, which is a long-distance cross-province application for Hubei candidates, with relatively weak regional preference; the university's enrollment proportion in Hubei is not high, with the 2025 Physics Category plan of 42 students accounting for a small proportion of the university's total plan that year, and regional factors have a neutral impact on application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 14.3%, and the slight increase in Physics Category candidates in Hubei Province, competition is expected to further intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 39091; the predicted minimum ranking is about 42492, with a range of 41992–42992.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Animal Medicine (Agriculture/Forestry category; five-year program)
- Grassland Science (Agriculture/Forestry category).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 41992–42992, it is recommended to mainly fill Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety options; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 41000), focus on applying for popular majors like Computer Science and Technology and Software Engineering; for rankings close to the upper limit (e.g., around 43000), it is recommended to use Tier 3 agriculture/forestry majors as safety options to avoid the risk of falling off the list.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 5205, 5314, 5766, 6489, and 5552 respectively, showing an overall fluctuating and then shifting backward trend, reaching a peak of 6489 in 2024 before rebounding to 5552 in 2025; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 5552; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hubei Province from 2021 to 2025 was 18, 16, 15, 22, and 15 students respectively, with 15 students in 2025; the 2026 plan is only 11 students, a significant reduction of about 26.7% compared to 2025, and the reduced enrollment quota somewhat eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 137th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a continuous upward trend in recent years (from 170th in 2021 to 137th in 2026), indicating steadily improving comprehensive strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving incidents related to library seat reservation management, with no significant negative public opinion; ranked 104th in overall Douyin popularity, rated as average, with low short video exposure and stable application attention; Ningxia University has no A- or above disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, with overall discipline strength mainly at the B level, focusing on ethnology, grass science, water conservancy engineering, etc., which has limited appeal to History Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and Teacher Training are in a range from divided observation to recommendation in terms of social popularity, with Law being relatively hot and recommended, and Chinese Language and Literature recommended; the number of History Category candidates in Hubei Province in 2026 is estimated at about 141,000 based on historical proportions, roughly flat compared to 141,400 in 2025, with a stable competition base; Ningxia University is located in Yinchuan, Ningxia, a university in the northwestern region, which is a long-distance cross-provincial choice for History Category candidates in Hubei, with relatively weak regional preference; the university's enrollment proportion for History Category in Hubei is not high, with a 2025 plan of 15 students accounting for a small share, and regional factors have a neutral impact on application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation trend, the significant reduction in enrollment of about 26.7% in 2026 which notably eases competition, and the roughly flat number of History Category candidates in Hubei Province, the ranking is expected to move forward based on the 2025 baseline of 5552; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4634, with a range of 4134–5134.
